prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity. No coordinates, contacts, AlphaFold-style models, or post-seal validation annotations are allowed.

RCSB title: SPERM WHALE MYOGLOBIN F46V N-BUTYL ISOCYANIDE AT PH 9.0. Entity description: MYOGLOBIN. Organism: Physeter macrocephalus. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.
